content.en:
Ye Tian didn't stay here and left quickly.

At the same time, the Dark Gods will be furious.

It's just that the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch is dead, but the Split Sky Heavenly Monarch is different, it is the Heavenly Monarch who has practiced the Great Realm Shift, and he has also reached the eight-star peak Divine General at the level of the Divine General, although it is not the Heavenly Monarch who is promoted by the Nine-Star Divine General, but the background of the Great Realm Shift alone is enough to make the Splitting Sky Heavenly Monarch one of the most terrifying Heavenly Monarchs.

Moreover, the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch comes and goes freely in the great universe, is a very important member of the Dark God Society, and is also a genius for assassination.

As long as there is a Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch, the members of the Dark God Society can easily travel around the Great Universe without taking time at all, and many actions can also be quickly retreated.

Once the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch is dead, the Dark God will directly abolish one-third, which is not an exaggeration at all.

After all, a Heavenly Monarch who has cultivated the Great Realm Shift is not so easy to be born.

What makes the Dark God even more angry is that the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch has the inheritance of the Great Realm Shift, and he can inherit it once.

This is the inheritance that the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch himself exchanged, and he has always been carried by the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch, and now that the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch has fallen, this inheritance is also equivalent to being lost and falling into the hands of the enemy.

The Great Realm Shift Inheritance is only kept in the hands of a few forces, and the Dark Temple is one of them, so you can imagine how precious this inheritance is.

If they had known that this was the case, they would definitely have let the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch transfer the Great Realm Shift Inheritance to exist in the headquarters of the Dark God Society.

Unfortunately, regret is useless.

-----------

"It's ......"

When Ye Tian was sorting out the inheritance of the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch and the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch, he found a Chaos Divine Power inheritance.

If it was an ordinary Chaos Divine Power inheritance, Ye Tian naturally didn't care.

However, this Chaos Divine Power Inheritance contains a strong spatial avenue atmosphere, and it is a Space Chaos Divine Power Inheritance.

This inheritance comes from the Split Heavenly Monarch.

"Could it be that the Great Realm has shifted?"

Ye Tian's heart moved.

If that's the case, then he's making a lot of money!

Immediately, Ye Tian checked this inheritance.

"If it's really a Great Realm inheritance, it can be inherited once!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

The Great Realm Shift may not be able to improve his strength, but it will make his life-saving ability instantly rise to a notch again!

Now he seems to be immortal, and no one among the Heavenly Monarchs can kill him, but in fact, no one can really kill him.

For example, if some Heavenly Monarchs cooperated, trapped his body, controlled his soul, and constantly grinded him to death, he would still die.

But if he practiced the Great Realm Shift, the Heavenly Monarch level would hardly be able to interrupt the Great Realm Shift, and with Ye Tian's life-saving means, no one would be able to kill him in an instant, so he could easily use the Great Realm Shift to escape.

Even some True Monarchs couldn't kill Ye Tian in an instant, and Ye Tian could completely escape from True Monarch's hands.

This is the real means of saving lives!

"If you want to cultivate the Great Realm Shift, you must have a super god-level space-time talent, I already have it, and I also need the Heavenly Dao Boundary Stone, which is more expensive, and it can also be exchanged in the Void Heaven System, but it requires 1 million points. "

Ye Tian muttered.

1 million points is a lot, but Ye Tian killed the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch and the Sky Splitting Heavenly Monarch this time, and the net worth of the two is also extremely rich, and if some unnecessary treasures are exchanged, it should be possible to make up 1 million points.

So, Ye Tian returned to the Void Heaven Hall and began to find some Heavenly Monarchs to trade, and the things that could not be traded were directly traded to the Void Heaven System.

In just half a month, Ye Tian finally scraped together 1 million points and successfully exchanged for a Heavenly Dao Boundary Stone.

As soon as the Heavenly Dao Realm Stone arrived, Ye Tian began to cultivate the Great Realm Shift.

The Great Realm Shift is more difficult to cultivate, far surpassing other supernatural powers, even if Ye Tian's comprehension has improved many times, and he has the help of his transcendent comprehension talent, it still took tens of thousands of years to practice it.

The Great Realm Shift was completed, and Ye Tian was completely relieved.

With the current situation in the Great Universe, he really doesn't need to worry about it at all, even if the enemy is good at soul means, there is no way to annihilate his soul with one blow.

The Perfection Void Heaven Dao Body not only brought him a powerful physical body, but his soul was also close to the immortal and immortal realm, others might be able to severely damage his soul, but they couldn't do it if they wanted to annihilate his soul.

"The next target is the Eternal Flame, I don't know where the Eternal Flame is?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

According to his understanding, the Eternal Flame was born in the sun, but it was not an ordinary sun.

Under normal circumstances, it is impossible for the sun of the general universe to give birth to the Eternal Flame, and there are also suns and stars in the chaos, but they are basically in some chaotic worlds.

Of course, hundreds of millions of Chaos Worlds may be able to give birth to the Eternal Flame, and it will take a long time to evolve.

Once the Eternal Flame appears, I don't know how many Heavenly Monarchs and True Monarchs will fight for it.

After all, the Eternal Flame is precious, and it is difficult to measure its value to those who need it.

Over the years, Ye Tian has been searching for information about the Eternal Flame, and many Heavenly Monarchs in the Void Heaven Hall know about it, but they don't have the Eternal Flame either.

this day.

Ye Tian finally learned the news about the Eternal Flame from a Heavenly Monarch.

"Tai'a Sun Star may have given birth to the Eternal Flame!"

When Ye Tian heard the news, he was immediately surprised.

At this time, the news had already spread in a small area, and many powerful Heavenly Monarchs had passed, but some weak Heavenly Monarchs did not dare to go, otherwise it would be easy to die.

After all, it has become a battlefield for the Heavenly Monarchs!

Of course, so many Heavenly Monarchs went to Tai'a Sun Star not entirely for the Eternal Flame, but also for other treasures.

That Tai'a Sun Star gave birth to a lot of yang treasures, and even gave birth to an innate sun tree, which is an innate origin tree, which is very valuable, especially for the Heavenly Monarch who walks the Sun Avenue, this innate sun tree alone is quite valuable.

"Pengyu Tianjun, they have already passed, but they didn't inform me!"

Ye Tian knew about this and was not angry.

In the past, when he was still weak, Peng Yu Tianjun would take care of him and even share some things with him, that was because he was not a threat to Peng Yu Tianjun, and everyone was not a competitor.

But now that he is close to the top 100 Heavenly Monarchs on the Heavenly Monarch List, Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch will naturally not inform him of the specific situation, otherwise there will be one more competitor, and there will be fewer opportunities to snatch treasures.

As for cooperation, Pengyu Tianjun can cooperate with other strong people, there is no need to find it.

Moreover, his status is too high, and Peng Yu Tianjun does not dare to cooperate with him, otherwise it will be difficult to distribute the treasures when dividing them.

"I'll go too, maybe there's an Eternal Flame!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
